summary: Video. White House event footage shows Steve Ronnebeck, the father of murder victim Grant Ronnebeck, delivering remarks at a podium while President Trump stands beside him, with a White House lower-third showing a number to text for updates. It is a recording of a speech with no music or added visual effects.
notable_text: TEXT "POTUS" TO 45470 FOR UPDATES FROM THE WHITE HOUSE; THE WHITE HOUSE
